CONSULTING SERVICES AGREEMENT
This agreement is governed by the laws of France. Any dispute shall be referred to the courts of Paris.
The client shall pay the consultant a monthly rate of 5000 EUR. Payment is due within 30 days of invoice.
Either party may terminate this agreement upon 30 days written notice.
The parties shall keep all exchanged information strictly confidential.
The consultant will perform the services with reasonable care and skill.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
